channel.title: Your Name Essays
channel.description: Essays, research, projects, CV, and photography.

item.title: AI for Science Notes
item.description: A first public note on how I think about models, molecules, and scientific judgment.

item.title: How I Read Papers
item.description: A practical reading workflow for technical papers and research taste-building.

item.title: A Personal Website as a Lab Notebook
item.description: Why a public website is a forcing function for clearer thinking.
